sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.description: Presenting concern in the caregiver's (or where applicable, child's) own words

sections.title: History of Present Illness
sections.description: Onset, duration, character, severity, associated symptoms, sick contacts, exposure history

sections.title: Developmental & Birth History
sections.description: Pregnancy/birth context, developmental milestones, growth trajectory as discussed or shown on a growth chart

sections.title: Immunization Status
sections.description: Immunization record as reviewed (caregiver report or vaccine card/record displayed) — no inference about appropriateness

sections.title: Vital Signs & Growth Parameters
sections.description: Vitals and growth percentiles as observed on a monitor or growth chart

sections.title: Physical Examination
sections.description: Age-appropriate exam findings as directly observed (HEENT, cardiopulmonary, abdomen, neuro, skin)

sections.title: Assessment
sections.description: Working diagnosis as explicitly stated by the clinician — no inference

sections.title: Plan
sections.description: Treatment, caregiver education, follow-up timing, when-to-return-immediately advice as stated
